description: MCP server for self-hosted Gotify push notifications and message management.
name: tv.tootie/gotify-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your Gotify server, e.g. https://gotify.example.com. No trailing slash.
environmentVariables.name: GOTIFY_URL

environmentVariables.description: Gotify application token for sending messages (Settings > Apps > Create Application).
environmentVariables.name: GOTIFY_APP_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Gotify client token for management operations (Settings > Clients).
environmentVariables.name: GOTIFY_CLIENT_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'stdio' when running as a local subprocess. Default is 'http' for container deployments.
environmentVariables.name: GOTIFY_MCP_TRANSPORT

title: Gotify MCP
